summary: Completed frontend testing for Customers page redesign. All 10 requested features are working correctly. The table shows colored avatars (different colors for each row), company name with Preview button and industry/location below, Role badges with correct colors (Owner=red, PIC=blue), Status column with Customer badge, and slide-in preview panel with green header, ABOUT THIS CONTACT section, DEALS section with + Add Deal button, and COMMENTS section with Add remark input.
passed_tests: Customers page loads with correct columns: COMPANY NAME, PIC/DOCTOR, ROLE, MOBILE, EMAIL, STATUS
Company name column shows colored avatar (amber/emerald/purple colors cycling), name, Preview button, and industry-location below
Role column shows colored badges - Owner with red badge (bg-red-600), PIC with blue badge (bg-blue-600)
Status column shows 'Customer' badge in blue (bg-blue-600/20 with blue-400 text)
Preview button opens slide-in panel from right side
Panel shows green header (bg-emerald-700) with avatar, name, title (PIC at Company), and email link
Panel shows ABOUT THIS CONTACT section with Email, Company name, Lead status, Lifecycle stage, Industry, Last contacted, Phone number, Job Title
Panel shows DEALS section with + Add Deal button and existing deals with progress bars
Panel shows COMMENTS section with existing comments and Add remark input
Open Full Profile and Cancel buttons in panel footer work correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Customers.jsx uses avatarColors array for cycling colors (amber, emerald, purple, blue, pink, cyan, orange)
roleColors object correctly maps Owner->red, PIC->blue with appropriate text colors
SlideInPanel.jsx handles Escape key close, overlay click close, and proper z-index (9998)
Comments in preview panel are MOCKED - stored locally in state, not persisted to backend
seed_data_creation: Used existing test customers: Teow & Teo Medical (Owner), Sentul Medical Centre (PIC), Poliklinik & Surgeri Rakan (Owner)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customers page fully tested with all features working: 1) Table shows COMPANY NAME, PIC/DOCTOR, ROLE, MOBILE, EMAIL, STATUS columns, 2) Each row has colored avatar (cycling through 7 colors), Preview button, and industry-location text below company name, 3) Role badges: Owner=red, PIC=blue, 4) Status shows 'Customer' badge in blue, 5) Preview button opens slide-in panel from right with green header showing avatar/name/title/email, 6) Panel has ABOUT THIS CONTACT section with all contact details, 7) DEALS section shows linked deals with progress bars and + Add Deal button, 8) COMMENTS section has existing comments and Add remark input (MOCKED - not persisted), 9) Open Full Profile and Cancel buttons in footer. Test credentials: demo@test.com / Demo123!
